egohygiene / papers

Research papers on systems thinking, AI governance, and reflective development architectures.

Papers

Reflector: Reflective Development Systems for Recursive AI-Augmented Software Engineering Draft

Introduces the Reflector framework for governing recursive AI-augmented development systems through scoped agents, human-in-the-loop checkpoints, recursive auditing, and milestone synchronization protocols.

📄 PDF 💻 Source

By Alan Szmyt · GitHub Repository
